name: 禁止客机作弊 / No Client Cheats
author: 煎包 / Cursor Composer 1.5
description:
多人联机时禁止客机（非房主）使用控制台作弊指令（如 gold、relic、card 等）。仅房主需安装。需 ModConfig 方可配置。
Multiplayer: Block clients from using dev console cheat commands (gold, relic, card, etc). Host-only install. ModConfig for settings.

致谢 / Thanks:
- sts2-heybox-support（小黑盒官方支持）
- 皮一下就很凡 @ B站（DamageMeter 作者）
